headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Intuitive Surgical at around US$453 per share is still worth your attention, or if the stock price already reflects most of the opportunity? The stock has been relatively flat over the past week with a 0.9% decline and is roughly unchanged over 30 days. Year to date it is down 19.3%, the 1 year return sits at a 15.7% decline, and the 3 year and 5 year returns are 49.4% and 65.8% respectively. Recent share price moves come as investors continue to assess the company's position in...

headline: Becton, Dickinson and Company Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) reported fiscal second-quarter revenue and adjusted earnings ahead of its internal expectations, while management raised its full-year adjusted earnings outlook and said growth was broad-based across most of the portfolio.
